construct_verdict_reason: Four items directly measure punitive and vigilante attitudes, but p72 measures approval of specific government anti-drug actions rather than endorsement of coercive or extralegal response principles.

items.reason: Directly measures endorsement of using violence to combat violence, a core component of the construct.
Directly measures preference for security over liberty, explicitly mentioned in the construct description.
Directly measures endorsement of community self-justice when authorities fail, a core vigilante attitude component.
Directly measures support for capital punishment, explicitly mentioned in the construct description.
Measures approval of specific government anti-drug policy implementation rather than endorsement of punitive/vigilante response principles, conflating policy evaluation with attitudinal construct.
